name: gha-bypass-cloudflare
description: GitHub Action that temporarily grants a runner access through Cloudflare controls.

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/post.js && node --check src/lib/cloudflare.js && node --check src/lib/config.js && node --check src/lib/constants.js && node --check src/lib/github.js && node --check src/lib/public-ip.js
